mapper.select:
/* CNSMP_STTUS_Dao_retrieveCnsmpSttusCndDeptList */
SELECT 'cnsmpSttusDept' AS cls_cd, '소비전력부서' AS cls_cd_nm, dscfc_bplc_cd AS cmmn_cd, MAX(dscfc_bplc_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(dscfc_bplc_sort_ordr) AS sort_ordr FROM GHG_DATA_LIST WHERE dscfc_bplc_cd IS NOT NULL AND dscfc_bplc_nm IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dscfc_bplc_cd ORDER BY sort_ordr

/* CNSMP_STTUS_Dao_retrieveCnsmpSttusList */
SELECT A.dscfc_bplc_cd, A.dscfc_bplc_nm, ROUND(A.itkpl, 2) AS itkpl, ROUND(A.prnplc, 2) AS prnplc, ROUND(A.fltplt, 2) AS fltplt, ROUND(A.buld, 2) AS buld, ROUND(A.trnsp, 2) AS trnsp, ROUND(A.dam, 2) AS dam, ROUND(A.etc, 2) AS etc, ROUND(A.tot, 2) AS tot_cnsmp, ROUND(B.itkpl_amt, 2) AS itkpl_amt, ROUND(B.prnplc_amt, 2) AS prnplc_amt, ROUND(B.fltplt_amt, 2) AS fltplt_amt, ROUND(B.buld_amt, 2) AS buld_amt, ROUND(B.trnsp_amt, 2) AS trnsp_amt, ROUND(B.dam_amt, 2) AS dam_amt, ROUND(B.etc_amt, 2) AS etc_amt, ROUND(B.tot_amt, 2) AS tot_amt, A.dscfc_bplc_sort_ordr AS sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT dscfc_bplc_cd, dscfc_bplc_nm, NVL(itkpl, 0) AS itkpl, NVL(prnplc, 0) AS prnplc, NVL(fltplt, 0) AS fltplt, NVL(buld, 0) AS buld, NVL(trnsp, 0) AS trnsp, NVL(dam, 0) AS dam, NVL(etc, 0) AS etc, ( NVL(itkpl, 0) + NVL(prnplc, 0) + NVL(fltplt, 0) + NVL(buld, 0) + NVL(trnsp, 0) + NVL(dam, 0) + NVL(etc, 0) ) AS tot, dscfc_bplc_sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT dscfc_bplc_cd, MAX(dscfc_bplc_nm) AS dscfc_bplc_nm, MAX(dscfc_procs_ty_nm) AS dscfc_procs_ty_nm, NVL(SUM(dscfc_usgqty), 0) AS inqire_iem_vu, MAX(dscfc_bplc_sort_ordr) AS dscfc_bplc_sort_ordr FROM GHG_DATA_LIST WHERE 1 = 1
AND dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6)
GROUP BY dscfc_bplc_cd, dscfc_procs_ty_cd ) PIVOT ( SUM(inqire_iem_vu) FOR dscfc_procs_ty_nm IN ( '취수시설' AS itkpl, '가압시설' AS prnplc, '정수시설' AS fltplt, '건물' AS buld, '수송' AS trnsp, '댐시설' AS dam, '기타' AS etc ) ) ) A, ( SELECT dscfc_bplc_cd, dscfc_bplc_nm, NVL(itkpl_amt, 0) AS itkpl_amt, NVL(prnplc_amt, 0) AS prnplc_amt, NVL(fltplt_amt, 0) AS fltplt_amt, NVL(buld_amt, 0) AS buld_amt, NVL(trnsp_amt, 0) AS trnsp_amt, NVL(dam_amt, 0) AS dam_amt, NVL(etc_amt, 0) AS etc_amt, ( NVL(itkpl_amt, 0) + NVL(prnplc_amt, 0) + NVL(fltplt_amt, 0) + NVL(buld_amt, 0) + NVL(trnsp_amt, 0) + NVL(dam_amt, 0) + NVL(etc_amt, 0) ) AS tot_amt FROM ( SELECT dscfc_bplc_cd, MAX(dscfc_bplc_nm) AS dscfc_bplc_nm, MAX(dscfc_procs_ty_nm) AS dscfc_procs_ty_nm, NVL(SUM(tot_amt), 0) AS inqire_iem_vu FROM GHG_DATA_LIST WHERE 1 = 1
AND dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6)
GROUP BY dscfc_bplc_cd, dscfc_procs_ty_cd ) PIVOT ( SUM(inqire_iem_vu) FOR dscfc_procs_ty_nm IN ( '취수시설' AS itkpl_amt, '가압시설' AS prnplc_amt, '정수시설' AS fltplt_amt, '건물' AS buld_amt, '수송' AS trnsp_amt, '댐시설' AS dam_amt, '기타' AS etc_amt ) ) ) B WHERE A.dscfc_bplc_cd = B.dscfc_bplc_cd(+) ORDER BY sort_ordr, A.dscfc_bplc_nm

/* CNSMP_STTUS_Dao_retrieveCnsmpSttusCsmtBplcList */ SELECT MAX(dscfc_nm) AS dscfc_nm, dscfc_id, MAX(dscfc_procs_ty_nm) AS cnsmp_div,
dscfc_use_de AS use_de,
SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 4) AS use_de,
ROUND(SUM(amt), 2) AS amt, ROUND(SUM(dscfc_usgqty), 2) AS usgqty FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 6) AS dscfc_use_de, dscfc_id, MAX(dscfc_nm) AS dscfc_nm, MAX(dscfc_procs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_procs_ty_cd, MAX(dscfc_procs_ty_nm) AS dscfc_procs_ty_nm, CASE WHEN SUM(dscfc_usgqty) < 0 AND SUM(tot_amt) > 0 THEN SUM(tot_amt) * -1 ELSE SUM(tot_amt) END AS amt, SUM(dscfc_usgqty) AS dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT dscfc_nm, dscfc_id, dscfc_procs_ty_cd, dscfc_procs_ty_nm, dscfc_use_de, CASE WHEN max_abs_dscfc_usgqty = 0 AND count_dscfc_use_slip_no > 1 THEN max_tot_amt / count_dscfc_use_slip_no WHEN dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd != 0 AND (dscfc_usgqty != 0 OR count_dscfc_use_slip_no > 1) THEN (dscfc_usgqty / DECODE(NVL(sum_dscfc_usgqty, 0), 0, 1, sum_dscfc_usgqty)) * max_tot_amt ELSE tot_amt END AS tot_amt, dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.dscfc_id, A.dscfc_nm, A.dscfc_lclhq_cd, A.dscfc_bplc_cd, A.dscfc_procs_ty_cd, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd = 'GHG_0024' AND cmmn_cd = A.dscfc_procs_ty_cd ) AS dscfc_procs_ty_nm, B.dscfc_use_de, B.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, B.dscfc_use_slip_no, NVL(B.tot_amt, 0) AS tot_amt, MAX(NVL(B.tot_amt, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY B.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS max_tot_amt, NVL(B.dscfc_usgqty, 0) AS dscfc_usgqty, SUM(NVL(B.dscfc_usgqty, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY B.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS sum_dscfc_usgqty, COUNT(B.dscfc_use_slip_no) OVER(PARTITION BY B.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS count_dscfc_use_slip_no, MAX(NVL(ABS(B.dscfc_usgqty), 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY B.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS max_abs_dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT dscfc_id, dscfc_nm, dscfc_lclhq_cd, dscfc_bplc_cd, dscfc_procs_ty_cd FROM GHG.tm_gg01101 WHERE dscfc_use_yn = '1' AND dscfc_regist_stat_div_cd = '1' AND dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd = '61' /* 전기 */ AND dscfc_lclhq_cd = '88888888' /* 위탁 */ ) A, ( SELECT ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de, MAX(ABC.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, MAX(ABC.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS dscfc_use_slip_no, NVL(MAX(ABC.tot_amt), 0) AS tot_amt, NVL(MAX(ABC.dscfc_usgqty), 0) AS dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, MAX(AA.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, MAX(AA.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS dscfc_use_slip_no, CASE WHEN AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') THEN MAX(AA.tot_amt) END AS tot_amt, CASE WHEN AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') THEN MAX(AA.dscfc_usgqty) END AS dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ A.dscfc_id, A.dscfc_use_de, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm, A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, A.dscfc_use_slip_no, A.tot_amt, A.dscfc_usgqty FROM GHG.tm_rq01103 A, GHG.tm_gg01104 B WHERE ( B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm LIKE '%CH4배출계수' OR B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm LIKE '%CO2배출계수' OR B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm LIKE '%N2O배출계수' OR A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') ) AND ( (A.dscfc_use_slip_no IS NOT NULL AND A.dscfc_use_slip_no NOT LIKE 'TMP%') OR A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd = '1' ) AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001')
AND A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) || '01' AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6) || '31'
AND A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) || '0101' AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4) || '1231'
AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id = B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id ) AA GROUP BY AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm ) ABC GROUP BY ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de ) B WHERE A.dscfc_id = B.dscfc_id(+) ) ) WHERE dscfc_use_de IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 6), dscfc_id ) GROUP BY dscfc_id, dscfc_procs_ty_cd,
dscfc_use_de
SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 4)
ORDER BY use_de, dscfc_nm
